The total amount paid: includes taxes, tips, fees, and other charges.
totalAmount - Variable in class com.mindee.v1.product.invoice.InvoiceV4Document

totalAmount - Variable in class com.mindee.v1.product.receipt.ReceiptV5Document

totalNet - Variable in class com.mindee.v1.product.financialdocument.FinancialDocumentV1Document

totalNet - Variable in class com.mindee.v1.product.invoice.InvoiceV4Document

totalNet - Variable in class com.mindee.v1.product.receipt.ReceiptV5Document
The net amount paid: does not include taxes, fees, and discounts.
totalTax - Variable in class com.mindee.v1.product.financialdocument.FinancialDocumentV1Document

totalTax - Variable in class com.mindee.v1.product.invoice.InvoiceV4Document

totalTax - Variable in class com.mindee.v1.product.receipt.ReceiptV5Document
The sum of all taxes.
